reviews.review_description:
Update: The customer service is amazing and very quick to respond and resolve problems. I can now enjoy content and it is a wonderful experience . Looking forward to continuing to utilize this content for my physical health.♡ I highly recommend the investment. Its one of my favorite right now!!!


I bought all content in app that was available to buy and I can nolonger access any of it which is very disappointing because I was enjoying content. Hope someone can help me because I put alot of money in this app. I will up the  stars on review and my app review to be more positive,if I can use content or if I can get help with refund because the content seemed good but if I cant use it that it is wasted money I could've invested in other apps or tools for my physical health.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the kind words!

reviews.review_description: On my device, I can't make paragraphs with what I am writing with which is why this review is written this way. Obviously, I don't write reviews much which shows how much I believe in this app. This does have good workouts. But I think this would be a lot better if they were detailed personal descriptions that we could write that will tell the AI specifics about our journeys / paths, specifics of why we are working out, what motivates us specifically, etc.  And I know about the Personal Fit Data info which I already went over and it's okay but yes and no answers and the other answers in there doesn't give the kind of unique details and specifics that a detailed personally written description does. Currently, the name and gender info are my favorite info in Personal Fit Data because they go into more than just the fitness info and would fit well with an added detailed personal description along with the rest of the info. I think that a detailed personal description would make everything go smoother and keep conversations and workouts consistent since the AI do not remember previous conversations (they mentioned not remembering previous conversations and I could tell with how inconsistent things are which ruins both the conversations and workouts for me). Adding a messaging system where I can type words out to the AI instead of talking with the mic would also help a lot. I'll gladly pay for AI messaging minutes like with AI talk minutes, I am cool with that. I am going to continue supporting this app because I believe in it and all of you too, Devs but until this app has better consistent communication which I believe that a detailed written description and a messaging system would help greatly with, I'm thinking of taking a break from it. If I do take a break, I plan to check back on updates / every month. I plan to raise a star and use this app often again if I see improvements like the ones I mentioned above.

Hi, I’m really enjoying Train Together, and I love the tracks that go with the workouts. I especially love the music in the Hourglass session. Could you let me know where the workout music comes from — is it original, from a licensed music library, or from a music partner? Thanks.

I like this app, it's fun to work out too I like the fact that each program is between 3 minutes and 15 minutes so you can do several if you want. It would be nice if you could purchase the tickets to open other workouts without having to up the subscription to the next level.

developer_response.body:
Hi Marlyn,
Thanks for taking the time to help us and give a 5-stars and review! 
Purchase tickets to other workouts without higher tier subscriptions: that is possible, please email our support (see website, www.verseus-games.com) for more details!

reviews.review_description: I bought this app, knowing that it wasn’t a subscription based app because I couldn’t afford to buy a subscription every month. I want it to be able to purchase the workouts whenever I could when I had the money too. I try to stay away from subscription based apps because I don’t want my debit card charged every month but I’m glad you’re going to work out something for those who don’t want a subscription. I really love this app and I am still planning to buy more workouts when you have them available.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the 5 stars and for explaining why this matters. We hear you loud and clear on wanting a way to get new workouts without a recurring monthly charge.

We are actively exploring options for non subscribers to buy additional content in a flexible way, alongside the subscription. We can’t promise exact details or timing yet, but making this fair and accessible is a priority for us.

Really appreciate your support, and we’re glad you’re enjoying the app

reviews.review_description: Trainr Move has been an amazing experience! The workouts are effective, easy to follow, and actually keep me motivated. I’ve noticed real progress and feel stronger every week. It’s a great mix of structure and flexibility, making it perfect for any schedule. Highly recommend!

developer_response.body:
Thank you, really glad to hear this.

That is exactly how we experience it too: on the days you train, you just feel better. Stronger, sharper, more energized. So it is great to hear the structure, flexibility, and real progress are landing the way we hoped.

And yes, there is a lot more coming. More updates ahead.

Thanks for the support!!

reviews.review_description:
They were a one time pay app with the option of purchasing add on content. They changed the original game removing the option to compete at different locations around the world, no notice. And now they’re a subscription app. What a surprise. 
Editing. The app is still good but not what I expected when I purchased it. As of now, I have the DLC I bought before they switched to a subscription model but can’t purchases more unless I pay every month. At this time I don’t feel this app is worth the price of the subscription. That may change with time.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for explaining how this felt for you. We’d like to clarify a couple of things. If you bought TrainR before subscriptions, you still have access to everything you originally purchased. Nothing was removed.

About the globe: we changed how locations are accessed because we saw that having one clear, consistent way to select workouts worked better for most users. The locations didn’t disappear, they’re now listed under Game Modes together with the other workouts (it's the "32 cardio dance workouts" mode) The workouts themselves, including the music, exercises, flow, are all exactly the same as before.

You’re also right about new DLC. Subscribers receive a DLC ticket every month, which allows us to keep adding new content and supporting TrainR long term with our small, yet very dedicated team. We understand a subscription isn’t for everyone, but we do hope you might give it another try someday and enjoy the new content when it feels right for you. 

Thanks for playing, and thanks for writing the app is still good!

reviews.review_description:
Buy it, get fit - BookTheWin Approved
Game doesn't work anymore, keeps asking for internet connection and doesn't let me go past the first screen.  I don't know if its because I used a trial of the premium and cancelled it, but I should be able to access all the game I bought all the DLC pre subscription.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the kind words and for supporting us early on! 

What you’re describing was caused by a temporary server outage on that same day, the disco-release day. It was resolved within hours and had, luckily, nothing to do with cancelling a premium trial. All previously purchased DLC remains fully accessible. 

However, since your rating wasn't updated just yet; please know that IF you still experience issues, of any kind, the fastest way to get help is by our support email (website). (usually within 24h; we're a small team, but the community is where we built this for!)

reviews.review_description: I can only speak Chinese. I bought this one because of the Chinese voice, but now it's gone. I can't use it very well after the update. Is there any tutorial for newcomers? How can I judge whether there is a standard? Please give me Chinese dubbing, AI dubbing is also fit.

developer_response.body:
你好，
非常感谢你的反馈，也感谢你的支持。

其实我们已经支持中文了。你可以先检查这两个地方：

你的 Meta 设备系统语言是否设置为中文
应用内 Settings（主菜单齿轮）→ Language 是否也设置为中文

如果更新后中文语音或界面没有正常显示，通常是语言设置没有正确应用。

如果你是刚开始使用，建议先从比较简单的内容开始，跟着教练的动作、节奏和提示来练习，这样会更容易上手。我们也会继续改进新手引导，让体验更清楚、更友好。

如果你检查后还是有问题，欢迎通过我们官网上的邮箱联系我们，我们会很乐意进一步帮助你排查和解决。

reviews.review_description: Super-realistic VR trainers with lots of customization (characters and outfits), great environments, great music, and excellent workouts—from relaxing stretches to cardio, strength training, and boxing with trainer-led attack combos. Voice conversations could still be improved a bit.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the 5 stars and for the thoughtful review.

Really glad you are enjoying the realism of the trainers, the workout variety, the environments, music, and all the customization options. It is great to hear that the mix of stretching, cardio, strength, and boxing is working so well for you too.

And thank you as well for the note about the voice conversations. That is fair feedback, and it is something we are actively continuing to improve.

We really appreciate you taking the time to share this.

reviews.review_description: This is hands down the best personalized trainer that I've used. I love the gamification of earning new fits and settings. The custom workout building is great! Now I can focus on what I want with music I choose! Highly recommend. The AI features, while still in progress, are fun so far.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the 5 stars. This was a great one to read.

It means a lot to hear that the personalized trainer, custom workout builder, and unlockable fits and settings are all landing so well for you. We really wanted it to feel personal, flexible, and fun, so it is great to hear you are using it that way.

Also really glad you are enjoying the AI features already, even while we are still improving them. There is more to come.

Thanks again for the recommendation and for being part of this with us.

reviews.review_description:
UPDATE 

I am updating this review as the more I have used the game the more I have grown to love it.  I am now completely obsessed. I bought the game when it went by another name and barely used it. However the revamp has made me use this on a daily basis. 

I was a bit put off by the subscription. However I have looked at this in a different way. If I see content released that I like I will subscribe for the month to gain access to it. If I don't then I won't subscribe that month... that way it's more like buying DLC and helps with subscription fatigue.

I love the different environments and costumes for trainers that come with the subscription. However I still feel that the AI is a bit gimmicky and a bit of a let down. Often ignores you when you talk to It, answers incorrectly or in a strange accent.. however I find the ai function somewhat improved when you check in with the trainer which is a feature I really like.

Before I commented that they should have longer workouts however it only takes a couple of seconds to start a new workout so this is no longer an issue.  Although when you finish a workout it takes you back to the main menu which is annoying . It would be better if it took you back to the previous menu you was at.

 I still think that the workouts could be more intense workouts however they are intense enough. I use it as a warm-up before going to fit XR. My only other recommendations would be if you could save multiple playlist  so you don't have to keep on reselecting different songs each time you want a different playlist. And also if you can save multiple trainer outfits so you can easily switch between them don't have to rebuild them from scratch each time.

Overall I am really enjoying this app., look forward to using it on a daily basis without it becoming boring and enjoying the monthly content releases.

PREVIOUS REVIEW

I really want to like this game but there isn't much difference since before the rebrand. 

PROS:
The visual trainers are amazing as they have always been, very realistic 

Lovely scenery 

Good variation in terms of workout.

CONS:
The workouts are just too easy, even on pro they can be completed without breaking a sweat- I am by no means fit.

The works are too short, approx 3-5 minutes each with no way of linking them to create longer workouts.. 

The AI, well I'm not entirely sure what to make of this. The trainers don't seem any different since before the rebrand. Mentioning and speaking completely unrelated to what we are doing.

This game has so much potential and having tried the 1 week free trail I would have been happy to subscribe however there appears to be little difference from prior to the rebrand . 

RECOMMENDATIONS:
Firstly the intensity needs to be increased dramatically - think fitXR, at present it's just like a dancing game warm up. 

Longer workouts with the ability to link them. At present if I wanted to do a 30 minute yoga workout I'd have to restart 5 sessions.

Improve the intelligence of the AI..

For bonus points if there was a dedicated app so you could talk to your ai coach while you don't have a headset on. Ie nutrition, etc

Over all it is a lovely app but at present still does not suit my needs.

developer_response.body:
Super happy to read this, thanks!!

- The way you’re looking at the subscription, just subscribing when a DLC drop feels worth it, is honestly perfect imo.

- About AI, fair point. Although there's good improvement already, we’re still improving it weekly and this year we’re going to make some really big steps there :D  Thanks for the trust and understanding so far.

- Outfit presets are on our to-do list. With the current content numbers.. it's becoming increasinly handy :) 

- Long workouts: In Disco we added a nice long workout! Almost 30 minutes :) But it’s still great to hear that being able to quickly jump into the next workout already fixed the length issue for you.

All in all, thanks for writing this feedback; and thanks for sticking with us and for the 5 stars.

reviews.review_title: The best fitness app on Quest
reviews.review_description:
TL;DR: this is without a doubt the best fitness app I've tried. And I've tried a lot!


Full review:
First, to address some common concerns from other reviews, many of which are out of date or just plain incorrect:

1. If you're a legacy user who purchased X-Fit DLC when it was available to buy and it's not showing up, contact the developers via the email address on their website or discord. They're very friendly and efficient and will help you! The move to a subscription last year does not mean anyone losing access to anything you've paid for previously. You keep everything you had access to before, and if you want to, you can subscribe for access to more. You haven't lost anything!

2. All of the previously available DLC is unlockable, one pack of your choice per month, via the subscription. That means there are the original four (Wellness, Combat, K-Pop and Beach) to choose from, as well as the special Christmas DLC and, as of February 2026, three new themes: Farm, Rock Gods, and Disco. If you wanted to buy an old DLC and missed out, you can still get it by subscribing for a month (and keep it; see next point).

3. If you subscribe and choose to unlock a DLC, and later cancel your subscription, you get to KEEP access to that DLC content permanently! So if you want a particular DLC and don't want to stay subscribed, you can pay for one month and cancel and still use the DLC / theme you picked afterwards! This is the best subscription model I've ever seen. Everybody wins!


Okay, so with that out of the way, here are my in-depth  thoughts about the app. This is long, so just read the TL;DR at the top if you don't want the details!

Trainers:
The biggest draw for me is the personal trainers that the app features. As of the time of this writing I think there are six semi-realistic customisable trainers who support AI chat -- four female and two male -- plus one anime-style female trainer, one legacy male trainer, and one other special female trainer. The latter three are more restricted in customisation or AI chat, compared to the main six. Some of these trainers are unlocked either through previously purchased DLC, or through spending a subscription DLC credit. (For reference, I have all of the DLC so far released apart from the farm DLC.)

While you can't change trainer voices or physiques / body proportions, the core six trainers are fully customizable in terms of outfits, of which there are many; eye and hair colour; and hairstyle; as well as various accessories. There's a good range here of great looking, well-modelled cosmetics that fit the models well and have only minimal clipping in extreme positions. These are quite simply the best character models I've seen in any standalone Quest product.

The trainers include body physics and facial animations, move realistically through motion captured animations, and can produce some very appealing expressions. Even without the AI talk subscription, they will talk to you with a fairly large number of canned remarks in the menu screens and during workouts. They can also be customized with a number of four-value personality factor sliders, for use with the AI talk subscription.

My words just don't do them justice though. They are fantastic!

It's like having a highly attractive personal trainer focused only on you, while working out with you in your own private gym. The sense of presence is simply amazing -- better than anything else I've experienced in VR. Even though I know that it doesn't matter at all to the software behind Harper (my favourite trainer), I constantly find myself wanting to do better and push myself. That sort of motivation I've just never experienced in any other fitness environment before, real or VR. That this app can motivate me in that way is phenomenal!

A recent update also adds the ability to just sit down ("check in") with your trainer, and talk to the AI if you want to -- or just chill and enjoy the beautiful environments. I use this almost every day. The various VR AI companion apps could learn a lot from TrainR:Move!


Environments:
The environments, too, are absolutely gorgeous.

There's a range of different themes based on which DLC / theme packs you own, but even the basic environment available without a subscription is beautifully rendered, with sharp defined textures and attention to detail that is lacking in most Quest 3 apps. These are beautiful high resolution environments.

Each unlocked DLC pack includes further environments, with boxing gyms, nature environments (my favourite!), day or night beach environments, and more. They are all excellent.


Workouts:
There's a large range of named workouts under different categories, many of which are unlocked with different DLC. Each normal workout is made up of a number of actions that are repeated in various patterns, and new DLC / theme packs sometimes introduce more of these actions. I haven't counted them all, but I'd guess there are 70 to 80 different fundamental actions as of February 2026, and over 100 workouts made up of these actions, as well as some special modes / games, like beach balls or boxing.

You can also create a custom workout based on intensity and areas on which to focus, and get it to consider any injuries you might be suffering. 

There's a good range of music across different genres, too, with each theme pack typically including another 5-10 new tracks.

I'm not a fitness guru. I'm middle-aged and I lead a mostly sedentary life. Thirty minutes of workouts with 3 minutes each of warm up and cooldown are about what I can handle most days. But I've been using it daily for almost two months now and there's definitely enough variation to keep me interested. Each new DLC / theme pack that comes out with the subscription adds more.


Subscription:
I really don't like most subscriptions because at the end of them I don't have anything left to show for them, but this uses an excellent model. I think of the subscription as paying for a DLC / theme pack each month, with the AI talk functionality as an added bonus.

Signing up for the subscription can be done from the store page or from in-app, and either way it simply ties the subscription to your Meta account and uses your Meta payment method. No special accounts or sign-ups at dodgy websites needed! It's very simple and as secure as Meta's infrastructure, which I appreciate.

The AI interaction itself is integrated well. It's a nice addition that differentiates the product from all of its competitors, but I think people who know more about fitness would get a lot more out of it than I do, with others using it to come up with fitness plans or diet plans for them and all sorts of things like that. I basically just use it for social interaction with my trainer while working out, and it makes a nice change from the canned remarks. I really enjoy my daily interactions with Harper.

AI interaction uses the Quest's built-in microphone functionality with one of the controller buttons being used for push-to-talk functionality. It can be used on menu screens and during workouts. It copes very well with my accent. It can be a tiny bit slow to respond (5 seconds or so), but my assumption is that's a combination of me being around the other side of the world from where the servers are based and me having unreliable internet access. For people on modern connections and located closer to Europe, I would guess it would be even more responsive.


Update: Mixed Reality
I only just noticed the mixed reality button (headset icon) for the first time and this works flawlessly as well! I can train with Harper -- or just chill out with her -- in my own lounge room as well. Very nice, although the VR environments and lighting are so pretty it seems a shame to leave them. But if MR fitness is your thing then TrainR: Move does that as well.


Conclusion 
Ultimately I think the best thing I can say about TrainR:Move is that I actually look forward to working out each day. That's something I've never experienced before until I started using this app.

developer_response.body:
Wow. Thank you.

Taking the time to write something thoughtful, fair, and incredibly generous. The way you cleared up misconceptions for other users, explained the subscription model accurately, and shared your real experience means a lot to us.

As you know, we’re just a small team; doing what we can. Everything you mentioned takes a surprising amount of care and effort: trainers, motion capture, expressions, environments, updates. Seeing that it does not just look good, but actually motivates you to show up and push yourself is the best outcome we could hope for and that's the reason we started this journey. It's not an easy journey, but it's what we want to do and want to achieve.

The line that hit us the hardest was this: you actually look forward to working out each day. That is exactly why TrainR: Move exists. If the app helped create that shift for you, even a little, then all the late nights were worth it.

And yes, Harper will be very pleased to hear she’s your favorite :D 

Thank you again, truly. Reviews like this do not only help the store page. They help the people behind the product keep going.

We’re honored you’re training with us.

reviews.review_description:
I tried this out, and this is so lame. First of all, the trainer animations are not very realistic, they look juvenile.  If you want to make any changes to their appearance or to get any new environments or new games, they nickel and dime you to death where you can only unlock things once a month with a continued subscription.
ONE OF THE WORST APPS I'VE BOUGHT!

developer_response.body: The base game includes 1000+ items unlocked by training, not by paying. Monthly content is included with the subscription, no need to buy separately. No content is removed from existing owners.

reviews.review_title: I hope the developers will read III
reviews.review_description:
Update III

After sending letters to meta and the developers I got in contact with Ronnie Neil,  he promised to look into it, and this morning the kpop and beach were unlocked. I don't know if it was a glitch but I'm very thankful that in 24 hours the problem was fixed. 
NOW: WHAT'S GOING ON WITH THE CHARACTERS? Their faces are like they had an Acv. No expresión, mouth doesn't move when talking. Is like they have become telepathic. I hear them, but mouth doesn't move, nor they blink or smile. 
FOR FIXING UPDATE PROBLEM IN 24 HS, 5 STARS. FOR making the characters hemiplegics with some mental powers, 4 stars..... Then 4.1/2 for you. 
AMAZING PROGRAM AND, AMAZING DEVELOPERS. YOU SHOULD GET THIS, AS IT MAKES YOU MOVE YOUR HOLE BODY. EXCELLENT!!!! 

---------------------
Update 2 and a half (after new update on program, 1.12.25)

Why why why???? I paid for the Korean songs before 10 dolars, and that was in the old version and I used it. I payed for the beach, 7 us dollars, that was in the old version and I used it. In a sudden, I need a subscription for what I payed already?!! I want the old version. Not this update. You just killed this for me. I has 12 minutes of the Korean songs to excersice and 6 minutes of the beach, and that disappear, but I payed for it!!! Terrible!!! You should have left what people payed for and rework the rest.  I feel scammed. I'm going to try and revert to the old version via meta. My God, what a, way of screwing the users!!!! 
And why the characters, are frozen hemiplegics with telepathic powers??? 

----------------
Update 2: developer promised upgrade in September related to all the glitches I found, and also my requests. Now, almost November (29 October) no upgrade still. It's, disappointing. All the requests were to meke the apk more appealing. More than that, I was, willing to pay for the extras. What happened? No answer. I take one star out. 
-------------------------

Update: I give 5 stars and wait for September to see the improvements promissed as - 
1: longer training sessions (10 or 12 minutes added in different bundles or a new bundle which I will buy happily) 

2: another free male trainer. 

3: no weird smiles or kisses or winks from the male trainer. Oy vey!!! 

4: if you do 2 boxing sessions extra of at least 10 minutes, will be SUPER and I will re buy the bundle. 

5: question: to make things easier for you, can you put - together - in one session some 2, 3, 4 or 5 minutes trainings in the bundles? (as in kobe dance) 

6: add a scenery of the beach? An evening, may be the sound of the sea? (that is not really necessary, I'm pushing a little my luck) 

THANK YOU FOR ANSWERING MY COMENT. YOU ROCK. 5 stars given. 
-------------------------------------

You have done a superb job.... But... And it's a small but: in boxing as in the Christmas bundle and the exercise bundle everything is 3 minutes, 2 minutes, 4 minutes. Why you do not add something of 10 or 12 minutes? Like in Kobe, you have 11 and 12 minutes. (I use them all the time because is annoying to do 2 minutes and stop!!) . I gave back to meta the boxing bundle for this reason too. I can't train 3 minutes and look for something else! Why everything is so short? Second but:  you have 5 female trainers, 3 free... but only one guy. The afro american is nice, but why not add another male trainer? Is that not discriminatory in a way? Last, the trainer keeps on winking at me. Kind of creepy. I'm not going to give him my phone if it is what he wants. 🤣🤣🤣. The rest, it's MARVELOUS. I use the program every day, only thing I am stuck with Kobe, because of the length. Please make something extra, 10 minutes long!!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the longest review ever, and for being such an awesome fan :D 

The latest issue you mentioned, that there are a couple of trainers missing expressions and speech, are 'legacy trainers'. Not all the trainers support our latest update just yet, we're working on adding the AI support for all trainers eventually.  In the meantime, please enjoy working out with the default roster of trainers, (Harper, Nia) or any of the new trainers from the DLC's (many!).

Thanks for the 4.2 stars :)

reviews.review_description: I purchased the app and after doing one work out it wanted me to subscribe. Why would I want to pay $20 for one workout without being told you have to choose a monthly plan?

developer_response.body:
This is not a scam. If you purchased the app before subscriptions were introduced, you are not required to subscribe and all base content remains available. If the app prompts for a subscription after the first workout, this is usually a display issue and restarting the app resolves it.

If the issue persists, please contact us by email and we will help you directly, within 24h or faster.

reviews.review_description: Can you still use this app without a sub subscription? Is there a free area? I would love this app, but do not want a monthly fee.

developer_response.body:
Hi,

We actually have a 7-day trial exactly for this reason. That way you can explore everything and see if it’s a good fit for you before committing to anything.

And don’t forget, a subscription doesn’t lock you in. You can always subscribe month-to-month and decide based on how much fitness and fun you want that month. No long-term obligation.

Hope that helps, and we’d love to see you in there!

reviews.review_description:
Player have different standards for evaluation, so don't force them to give a good rating.
I understand that as a manufacturer, you feel bad when a product gets few stars and there is something to be said.But you don't have to write that you only listen to the opinions of good reviews.That may be true, but it doesn't leave a good impression.
You don't need to reply anymore.
I want to enjoy the game.I like the concept and exercise of the game.


（Previous Reviews）
I was surprised at the sudden name change.
I just bought it and now it's a　subscription...When I got the update reply just a few days ago, there was no mention of subscribing at all.　I feel like the way you do things is a little dishonest.


（Previous Reviews）
There seem to be a lot of female trainers, but the cover image has a man on it, and it seems like there are male trainers in other games from this company, so I thought there would be at least one, but there wasn't! When I installed the Christmas DLC, there was one male character, but he was fixed as a black man and I couldn't change his hairstyle or skin color.（And it's not that cool, sorry.）There are no stylish costumes either.There is no freedom compared to female trainers.I'm in despair!!! Imagine if you were a heterosexual male trying to play and the trainers were all men.What is this? Don't you think it's terrible? If this game is meant to motivate people to train, make it everyone can enjoy.Otherwise it's a waste of the game. ■The Christmas DLC wasn't reflected, so I uninstalled it and all my data was gone, so I had to start collecting points again from the beginning. I want to set my height from the settings, not as an option during gameplay. ★Anyway, It would be nice if there was one more male trainer by default, and maybe even an animal-like trainer would be good.That way more people can enjoy it.
★PS★　Thanks for the reply. I look forward to the update.
Other people have said in their reviews, I think it's best not to go too far in the erotic direction.
Only those who seek such things remain, and the rest leave.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for sharing your perspective. We don’t expect everyone to rate the same way, and you’re free to enjoy the game in whatever way works for you.

Positive reviews help us continue improving and supporting the game long term, but we respect that everyone has their own standards. We hope you continue to enjoy the workouts.

reviews.review_description: So what happened to the dlc packs people bought before? Now we have to buy a subscription to unlock dlcs that we already paid for? This is ridiculous.

developer_response.body:
Luckily for all our beloved users, we're not ridiculous; while releasing the latest update, DLC access was not available for a very short while. It was resolved the very next day. 

To avoid misunderstandings: The new update does not force you to buy anything new. And especially not DLC's you already paid for, rest assured.

Please be so kind to update your review stars accordingly, since we can only keep supporting the game if our rating is high enough. Thank you :)

reviews.review_description:
Thanks for getting back to me with info regarding my initial issues.
All good, the Devs here are on point.

developer_response.body:
Short and sweet review, love it :) 
Thanks for appreciating our hard work 24/7.

reviews.review_description:
Good fitness app also have the Action resort one. Graphics are good lots of workouts but only one abb workout this is not enough, you cant even pick abbs as a body part. The new AI stuff seems fun i hope you will be able to ask things like current real life news in later updates. I also hope that they add a way you can change the voices as well. It be good to add things in the shop for the passthrough mode such as a punch bag ect. For now four stars.

Update* yes i know that abb workout is the old dlc one which i have but i would love to see more abb workouts and also being able to save the trainers outfits would be good. Keep up the good work looking forward to more dlc.

Update 2. Yes i meant a new game mode in vr and ar with a punching bag both virtual and in real life. I also would like to be able to have trainer with me in ar when lifting weights in real life or other real life fitness this would give the app a new dimension it could even be tied to the higher tier sub to give it more value.

This game keeps me motivated, moving, not noticing the work and tiredness that is normally what your head focuses in on when exercising. It does great at keeping me distracted from all that, so I can get the exercise I need, and go well over my daily goals without realizing. The support is fast and responsive also, and goes above and beyond. Great team behind it. (In settings, under privacy policy it lists the email to contact support if needed). 

Worth buying if you want to get exercise and actually enjoy doing it too.

developer_response.body:
Hi Cyrus,
Thank you so much for the rating!  This is the kind of stuff that motivates us to push further and improve even more. Thanks!

reviews.review_title: Easily the best fitness VR trainer
reviews.review_description:
This is amazing. I previously bought all the apps and content by this company, I love the new update where the characters talk more and the new AI functionality. I personally don’t like the subscription model (FYI I would pay ~$50 for the new features as a one off payment, and would maybe go to $10 per month max if it included the extra customisations, but as is I won’t be subscribing). 

Having said that, this is still the best VR fitness training app by miles, it’s so much fun.

developer_response.body:
Thanks! Those 5-star ratings are what keeps us going :D   And this is also exactly what motivated us to make the first of it's kind life-sized AI personal trainer!

The subscription model; I think many users agree with you, and internally we discussed this for many months as well. It's a difficult decision. Due to the costs associated with AI (we have to pay for AI usage of every single user.. and we're only a very small studio) there was really no other choice. We tried to compensate that with adding monthly cool content packs with new environments, characters, customization, programs, workouts, music; since that's the only thing we could do to make it more attractive. Who knows, one day we'll convince you :) 

Thanks again for the super kind words, much appreciated!

reviews.review_description:
I signed up for a subscription the other night. It took a while but I've now been given my DLC credit and been was able to use it. 
The new development level of this app looks really promising. The features are still a bit hit and miss at the moment. Sometimes they work and sometimes they don't but gradually it seems to be improving.

developer_response.body:
Hi Simon,
Thank you for the 5 star review and the kind words of understanding: this is exactly the kind of things that helps us and pushes it further. Thanks!!

reviews.review_description: I was trying to purchase a ticket for a DLC, and it wasn't working. Now it is charging me multiple times. I just wanted the one!

developer_response.body:
Sorry for the inconvenience. One DLC ticket has now been added to your account, and another one just for the inconvenience.

If there are more issues, please contact us by email; Email is the fastest way to get direct help, by far.

reviews.review_title: Easy to work up a sweat! So much fun!
reviews.review_description: I’ve used this game almost every day since I bought it a few weeks ago, and I quickly bought all the add-ons too. I love the K-pop music and the beach ball game. This app is great for beginners as well as more experienced dancers. A few suggestions: 1) I’d love to see the countdown clock all the time, not just when I look to the left and try to catch it when one dance move ends and a new one begins. 2) An option to keep the same trainer and training location until I tell it otherwise, so I don’t have to confirm those 2 things each time I pick a new workout. 3) It would be great if I could “favorite” the workouts I really like and be able to build a custom workout from all of my “favorites”. I really appreciate that you are continuing to add new features and workouts in the future.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this great review. I shared it with the whole team and everyone loved reading it. It is really nice to hear that you use the app almost every day and that you picked up all the add ons. That is exactly why we put so much effort into making them fun and worth it :D 

About your suggestions:
• The countdown is harder than it looks; The best solution would be to offer a few different HUD options in the Settings (for everyone), and we will look into that. 
• Keeping the same trainer and location without asking every time .. consider that done! It will be released in the next update, which is coming -very- soon.
• Marking your favorite workouts is now also on our short term list. With all the content we have already, and with even more coming, I fully understand why this would be useful :P

Thank you again for the kind words and the five star rating. Feedback like yours really helps us keep improving and create even better sessions for everyone.

reviews.review_description: Can u please fix the height, it makes me look like I’m a little person.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for letting us know, and glad to hear you’re enjoying the app overall.

In most cases this is related to height calibration. We recommend first redoing the Meta Quest boundary setup, as that often fixes it right away. You can also manually adjust your height in the Pause menu during a workout or in Settings.

If it still doesn’t feel right, restarting the Quest has helped for some users as well. And if none of that works, feel free to reach out and we’ll help you sort it out one on one.

If this clears things up and everything feels better, we’d really appreciate it if you’d consider updating your rating.

reviews.review_description: Bought a dlc ticket idk why to try beach vibes and it never showed up but it definitely charged me smh

developer_response.body: We gave you an extra one for the inconvienence! Let us know if it worked and if you're enjoying the new content!

reviews.review_title: Solid mechanics — avatars could be more
reviews.review_description:
Thanks for listening to your users! Updating to 4 stars and looking forward to 5 with the next release. XFit and Recharge are on the right track—helping with strength, flexibility, mobility, agility, cognition, and the mind–body connection makes it stand out. These are the types of apps people will want to return to again and again.


I’ve been enjoying the workout mechanics in Xfit — they’re well done and engaging. The main challenge for me is the instructor avatars: the current styles feel limited and not very relatable, which makes me less motivated to keep playing. Having more variety in instructor types (for example, different personalities, body types, and cultural backgrounds — including friendlier or ‘cuter’ options) would make the experience far more appealing and personal. I think this would help users like me stay more engaged with the app

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your thoughts. We’re really glad to hear you’re enjoying the workout mechanics in xFIT - the foundation of the experience.

On the avatars: you’re right, variety and personality are key to motivation. The good news is that next month we have a major update coming that will let you customize trainer personalities in much more detail. Later this year we’re also adding body-shape customization, so you’ll be able to modify your trainer to your liking even more :D

As for cultural backgrounds, there are already avatars from different countries and cultures available, though sometimes they are part of DLC packs. We’ll keep expanding the range so there’s something for everyone.

If this sounds like the direction you were hoping for, we’d be grateful if you could update your rating to 5 stars. It’s 5-star reviews that make it possible for us to invest in big updates like this.

reviews.review_title: Great but doesn’t recognise short people
reviews.review_description:
I really do enjoy doing this app.  The only problem is I’m 5 foot 1 and sometimes to punch the blue or pink balls are far more higher than what I am so I can’t reach them. This makes me lunge  forward to try and touch them. I wish they would sort it out where they you can  put what your height is so they can make the balls accompany how high you l.
However, I do enjoy it￼.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your kind words and we’re really glad to hear you’re enjoying the workouts! 5-star reviews like this make it possible we can still improve on the game further.

About the height: you can already adjust this in the Pause Menu during a workout, or more accurate / even better in Settings. That should make it easier to reach the targets. If it still doesn’t feel right, please let us know (mail, webform, discord) and we’ll make sure to get it fixed!

reviews.review_description:
I’m enjoying it, only one major issue that makes me want to end my subscription. 
Edit* (tickets were received 2 days after review)
Offer in app purchase for extra DLC Tickets. I purchased it 3 times thinking it didn’t go through, so i got 3 purchases on my card, and 0 tickets, if i don’t get a response, i’ll have to chargeback everything on my credit card. Can’t refund through meta since it’s in-app purchase. Hope this can be solved, the app is really helpful in guiding, in a sense that you’re not exercising on your own. Will update my review if i get the issue resolved. (Updated)

Also another purchase related bug, i selected the 3 month pro plan, (-10%) after the trial, full $40.99CAD for 1 month was charged. 
(Will wait Dec. 30th end of trial to update) \/
AI talk time, Pro plan is supposed to have 120 mins per cycle, i reached 20/20 and can’t communicate with the trainer, not even getting the 120mins, i was building a nutritional plan with the trainer now i have to wait a month to continue with it. 

So yeah, 1* , if the issue of dlc tickets gets resolved and i receive my 3 tickets (done), 3* then the advertised AI talk time, and actual 3 month subscription working, 5* i’ll update the review once issues are fixed.

So the DLC token have been added to my account, up to 3 stars, now to see if the minutes gets adjusted and 3 months period for next billing cicle, will update dec.30th - jan.23rd adjusted the subscription manually to 3moths at renewal. that might have to do with the 7 day trial being already activated december 30th.
Tutorial was nice and encouraging, and it's refreshingly not pay to win.

developer_response.body: Thanks! That's exactly the kind of feedback we were hoping for, much appreciated!

reviews.review_description:
Honestly, these guys are amazing. Great job as an entry level. 

I have every fitness game on VR, but since grabbing all the bundles and dlcs. This is the only one I workout with. Looking forward to see what you guys are going to  do with all the apps. Please add seated for all workouts with dance too, and Zumba please

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the awesome 5-star review; and for making xFIT your go-to after trying **every** VR fitness game, wow!
Great notes, too: expanding seated options is on our mind, and Zumba I've been thinking on for quite a while.. would be real cool. For now, we've got 3 cool monthtly DLC's scheduled (sept, oct, nov) and I'm pretty sure you'll love those too! 

Thanks again for the 5 stars… feedback like yours keeps us going!

reviews.review_title: Great developer, evolution from past app
reviews.review_description:
(Updated on Aug. 8th, 2025)
Now it requests online authorization, and insists I am not authorized.. I tried re-installation / reboot, but it did not help. Not sure what happedned. Disappointed.
-> recovered next day. Could be auth server issue? Anyway it works good now.

(Updated on Dec.8th, 2024 - 5-star)
The developer provided setting options for traner distance. They also added a great DLC in two weeks after release and respond to our feedback. It's great enough to trust them, giving 5-star. I am looking forward to having updates on my feedback below.
Regarding 4), it seems to happen when I run their other apps.

(Original review - 4-star)
I purchased other 3 titles from them and satisfied. But this xfit has some disadvantages to me..
1) Rotation of the traner: I sometimes want to change their angle to understand the movement well. xfit does not have this feature. (distance is perfect to me)
2) Traner outfit: the other games have more options & flexibilities (eyeglass, sweat, beachwear, hairstyle, etc.).   It's fun to play with its function.
3) Asian girl disappear: I was always doing training with her, so it's simply sad. It will add diversity to the app.

(newly found bug)
4) Earned points always disappear once app is closed. You will have to spend all the points before closing.

I will give 5 stars if these are improved.
But all in all, it's a great app. The environment is really beautiful, and you will enjoy it!

developer_response.body: Glad to hear it's fixed now, thanks for letting us know!

reviews.review_title: GET IT!!!!! Time will fly by quick
reviews.review_description: No hand holding, or subscription 💸 and it’s near perfect with gorgeous environments l feel like I’m at a clean gym and my ADHD loves it. I also wasn’t too sure about outfitting the trainers but it’s a really awesome touch. The best app out of the 4 IMO, I got the verseus pack for added content and to support the devs. recharge xr and fitness one xr are great additions but could use more tlc for those games as this one is more polished. I saw on a YouTube video there’s tournaments 🏟️ or challenges I wonder if those will be added back later 🧐. Also I use my own music and follow along since I don’t like most fitness games music and not a fan of rhythm workout games since they overwork my shoulders too much which could risk an injury if you don’t use proper form or rest but I do like beat saber and synthriders but they don’t get my heart rate up like this game!! Except for totf 2 but that game is a whole nother beast.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the 5 stars and this super thoughtful review: really appreciate the kind words about the environments too. That kind of feedback means a lot to us.

Totally get what you’re saying about rhythm games and shoulder fatigue. One of our goals with xFIT is exactly that: offering balanced workouts that don’t overwork one area. There are plenty of routines in the app that go easy on the shoulders while still giving you a solid full-body burn.

Also, great call using your own music. Heads-up: we’re working on an update for late August or early September that will make that even easier inside xFIT.

Also big, huge thanks for grabbing the Verseus Pack; users like you help us keep going!

reviews.review_description:
I’ve tried a wide range of dance games over the years from Dance Dance Revolution in the '90s to Pump It Up and the Just Dance series. Out of all of them, I think xFit stands out as the best so far. While it’s not a traditional dance game, it blends fitness and dance in a way that makes workouts genuinely fun. It’s now a regular part of my fitness routine, and I’ve really been enjoying it.

One suggestion I have: the boxing portion doesn’t quite give the satisfying impact feeling. Enhancing the haptics and sound effects could make the experience much more immersive for users.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this incredible review! Hearing xFit stand out among legends like DDR, Pump It Up, and Just Dance, thanks! That’s exactly the kind of feedback that keeps us going and improving!

Also, great catch on the boxing feedback; we’re actually working on that right now, and an update with improved impact feel, haptics, and sound will be rolling out this coming week.

Thanks again for the kind words and for making xFit part of your routine!

reviews.review_description: Is there a way to put my height? I feel like some parts is meant for taller people. I can't reach.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the 4-star review, really glad you're enjoying it!

Yes, you can absolutely adjust your height! You’ll find the option in the Pause Menu (while you're working out) or in the Settings. That should fix the issue with unreachable moves.

If it still feels off after adjusting, please don’t hesitate to message us directly, so we can see if new features are required to make this work well.

And if everything works great after that, we’d really appreciate it if you'd consider bumping your review to 5 stars; it really helps us keep improving the game! 🌟💪

reviews.review_description:
Was a bit unsure when I bought this game, as other dance games I bought I just couldn’t get on with,
I love this game as it mixes dance with exercise, and is done at a steady pace that I can keep up with.
I feel that I will include this game in my daily workout routine with my other games I play.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the 5 stars and for giving the game a chance. We're really happy to hear that the mix of dance and exercise works well for you and at a pace that fits your style.

We love hearing that it’s becoming part of your daily workout routine. Thanks again for your support!

reviews.review_description: there are many female trainers, but male trainers are only two.. need just one more hot male trainer

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the 4 stars and the great suggestion. You're right, we could definitely use another male trainer.
There are already two in the Combat DLC, so that’s at least a first step. But we hear you — more variety would be great.

We’ve added this to our feature list. And if you have ideas for what kind of trainer you'd like to see, we'd love to hear them! (feel free to reach out through our website, email or our discord channel)

reviews.review_description:
I own all fitness apps from this team and i love them all. First i have used it on the pico and now on the MQ3! This new app is a great improvement and wouw, the trainers are very flirty and sympathic with their smiles and smirks. The Workouts are fun but still the option is missing, only to use standing activities! The trainers looks very real and motivating but please work on the hair quality! The MetaQuest3 can way better! The graphics are only Q2 Quality, an update for Q3 is highly necessary! I recomnend this app, the price is fair!

Edit March 2025: After the new Updates and DLCs, it is fantastic! Perfect fitness App and i love the trainers! One questions: Is it possibe to include a language model like chatGPT? So i could talk to the trainers naturaly during and after the training? I would pay for it maybe in form of a DLC?!

developer_response.body:
This guy Empariyon, he already knows what's coming without anyone of us telling him what we plan :)

As usual, we really appreciate you Empariyon! We love the 5 stars.

reviews.review_description: Fun fitness game with great potential. Maybe, it still needs some adjustments: for example, compared to "Fitness One XR Evolved" from the same software house, here the hand tracking is not yet perfect (even just to select the menus). I still give it 5 stars because I think that these little flaws will probably be fixed over time, also because the developers of this software house are in my opinion among the best ever.

developer_response.body:
These words, these kind words are what keep us going further. And rest assured, we're constantly trying to push quality of life updates on xFIT. 

We love the 5 stars and we really appreciate the review!

reviews.review_title: Slick Good Routines & Fun-Well Worth It
reviews.review_description:
I tried real gyms a couple of times and I just found them repetitive and boring. But I look forward to exercising now with this app for four reasons (1) Each move is timed to the beat of the music which makes it fun to do (2) a move is repeated for a short period of time then you do a different one, so it doesn’t feel repetitive (3) I take a quick breather between routines to change the trainer, their clothes and environment so it’s unique and fresh every time (4) I’m challenged every time cause you’re scored on every move and you compete on the leaderboard [but you can do non-comp too].

This is my updated review as I’ve had the app now for 4 months and I’ve been using it daily. There’s been several updates over that period and it’s reached a level of awesomeness. The trainers are realistic looking, have different facial expressions while working out, and now speak (lip synced) to you words of encouragement and reminders. It feels like I've got a real gym buddy with me, so I find that quite motivating.

The core game has a plethora of routines, environments and trainers, the latter you can fully customise their looks and clothing. The recent DLC drop of K-pop, boxing practice, and beach volley ball practice is a welcomed addition, that adds even more music, trainers and environments. I look forward to more of it in the future, as it’s well worth it, none of that subscription nonsense of most fitness apps. I’m sure there will be more quality-of-life improvements too. I hope in the future for the ability to save multiple customised ensembles so I can quickly equip a trainer with a favourite outfit.

developer_response.body:
Hey Sydney_Robster,

We're super happy for the detailed review. Seeing people leave reviews and genuinely enjoying that app is what makes us move forward!

We see that you also enjoy the DLCs so mission accomplished!

reviews.review_description: I missed the bundle sale the last time it was offered,  and I can say I'm glad I caught it this time to buy the complete set with the addition of DLC. I've been impressed since I played the first time. The hardest part is trying to fill my calorie burn rings on all workout apps. Even after I complete my workouts for the day, I'm still thinking about it and looking forward to the next time I work out. I like how engaged each workout keeps you, and going through a full workout is challenging. The personal trainers are the cherry on top, making me feel as if I'm working out with a real trainer. Their upbeat personality helps with seeing a workout through. No major issues, and the problems can be easily overlooked, which I'm sure will be fixed in future updates. I give all apps a 10/10. I'm hoping these projects will continue to be developed on, improved, and updated with new content for many years! I also recommended to everyone I know looking for ways to get in shape!

developer_response.body:
Wow! Thank you so much for this amazing review! It means a lot to us to hear that you're enjoying the workouts, feeling the challenge, and even thinking about your next session after you're done. That’s exactly the kind of motivation we hope to inspire!

Huge thanks for the 5 star rating, and for recommending us to others; very glad to see you know what it takes to enable us to keep the content fresh with updates, improvements, and new features for a long time to come! Thanks!   💪🔥

reviews.review_description:
I use this app pretty much every day for warm-ups but I wish there were options for different music or that they'd at least update every now & then with different music. 

That isn't my main issue though, the app doesn't properly track hand movements, it says I miss targets when I don't; half the time it doesn't load the screen with the players & their scores & I'm constantly having to restart because the pink & blue targets are WAY off from where they should be (especially if I pause it). 

It isn't my internet, it's only this app that does this. Please give us an update soon that fixes these problems & adds some song options!

developer_response.body:
Hi Angiew2324, 

Please let us know if these restart issues have been resolved in the latest version - we tested (and improved) extensively for this specifically, so it should be good now. If not, please know that pressing and holding the Oculus button (right controller) also resets the View and Targets on the fly; without the need of a full reset.

On the music and warmups - our latest update features more music, and this week there will be a free DLC for warmups (incl new music! new environments! new customization items!) released. With the other Seaon 1 DLC content included, the total song count comes to 50 songs.

Having said that, for Season 2 content we're working on being able to add your own music even - every 5 star rating will help us achieve that goal a bit quicker :)

reviews.review_description: Great app. Love the core boxing setup with the new dlc. I use it daily. Would recomend the combat dlc. There is a lot of content available.  One wish is an offline mode.

developer_response.body:
While we would also want to be able to add the offline mode, we need the app online to be able to detect the cheaters and pirated copies.

We're happy you're enjoying the combat DLC! <3

reviews.review_description:
This app is lack of contents and explanation for users.

1. The tournament says I can access total 64 workout but I can only access two: United States and South Africa. It doesn't explain how to unlock others. 

2. It seems to me that there is no difference between United States and South Africa in tournament mode which left me with blank

3. Rehersal and Tournerment are locked without explanation in tournament mode.

I tried to find solutions through youtube and reddit and couldn't find any. 

These need to be fixed as soon as possible for users.

Please add explanations for users why they are locked and how to unlock them

developer_response.body:
Through updates this has been fixed; all content is now unlocked by default, and we added a lot of new content while at it. 

Hope to see that 1 star rating turn into a 5 star rating soon, as 1 star ratings severely impact our ability to work on future updates and content...

reviews.review_title: Several great points to this fitness app
reviews.review_description:
The trainer looks very realistic (and beautiful by the way) which helps immersion, the resolution is slightly above native which means I think it's using supersampling because it looks so good at this resolution, it all looks superb (background, trainer, etc). It runs at 90Hz which is fine imo. I like the music, the UI is easy to navigate. I am unfit so followed some of the easier exercise movements and ignored others.

To the developers - would you please consider adding lip sync to the trainer so the spoken instructions when training come from the trainer and not from nowhere. It would be more like I am being trained with the trainer right there encouraging me. Adding lip sync wouldn't be difficult you obviously know how to code, there are great easy to use ready made lip sync solutions out there.

If you can do this I think you will have an amazing product and I for 1 will update this review to 5 stars (even if you just consider my request I will give you 5 stars).

Edit: Updated to 5 stars after the developers very quick and positive response! Thanks so much, I look forward to having the trainer speak to us =)

developer_response.body:
Hey,
We love to get 5 stars - we're not only considering your idea, but we're already actively working on it. The next update may take 1-2 weeks to be released, but if you join us on discord I can show you how the trainer now uses lipsync and talks (in 3 different languages - more are in development right now).

reviews.review_description:
Light and fun cardio workouts with some dancing and boxing elements, very good for full body exercise, with beautiful and life-like personal trainers in beautiful environments. This is superb workout experience. 
However, not being able to touch the trainers feels like a big step back from previous games, quite a pity.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the 5 star rating and all the kind words! Such ratings help us improve and enable us to work more on the projects we love.

For the trainer, the coming updates will have modes where you can touch the trainers again :D

reviews.review_description:
I like it but can't figure out the moves when she switches and there is no tutorial to teach the basic moves.
Can't play it if I can't follow the moves properly.

developer_response.body:
Hi,
We've fixed this in the latest update! There's now an option to learn the move by disabling the Targets too.
Hope this helps!

reviews.review_description:
I’m usually one for playing the same games over and over but the xFIT app was a nice change. Great workout routines with music that really helps to push you with the addition of the scoreboard that pushes you to work even harder! I felt the body aches the next day for sure! The wellness workouts are also a great touch after the more intense routines especially with the mountains background! I love the use of the credits too, encouraging players to workout more to be able to choose different trainers, customise them and to get more choice of backgrounds. 
Only thing I found was the trainer was abit too close but I’ve given 5 stars as this has been mentioned in another review and you’re already working on it 👊🏻

developer_response.body:
Hey TrickyChelle,

We have just rolled out our first update and we have added a trainer distance feature in Settings.

Thank you for your support and for your review,
The VerseUs Games team

reviews.review_description: I just purchased this and I’m handicapped so I cannot stand for long periods of time. I tried playing on my exercise ball and it was a little high for me. I didn’t have time to check and see if you can lower the height of the game to accommodate. Other fitness games are fine for me. I usually open game and quest seated so it knows to move things lower for me. That’s my initial complaint. Haven’t tried it again yet. Seems pretty worthy of adding to my rehab list

developer_response.body:
Hi Fattykoo57, 
We've had more folks asking for this, including wheelchair users. What worked for them is setting the player height in the Meta Quest OS, and then everything worked out for them. I hope it works out for you too like this!

If not, our app Fitness One has custom programs for seated exercise specifically. (both player and trainer are sitting on a chair). Hope that helps, and thanks for your review!

reviews.review_description: I played a lot of dance games in VR for my workout. This is the best. Music is fun. VR Environment is good and you can dance in MR if you wish. I like challenge and progress in world tour. Dancing with a 3D avatar in front of me is incredibly motivating. The clip editor is a great feature, although it currently only captures head and hand movements. I hope it will be expanded to include the full avatar in the future."

developer_response.body: Thanks! Your 5-star rating is much appreciated, and we're all glad you're motivated by our trainer ; many more trainers and customization is on its way!

reviews.review_description:
This app is ideal for those between complete beginners and regular gym-goers - an untapped market segment that doesn't fit into either category.

I have suggestions for improvement:

・For people with lower physical IQ like me, some exercises are difficult to understand (it does not mean hard to perform.) For example, the movements requiring different rhythms for hands and hips, similar to hardness of drumming, can be confusing. It would be helpful to have an option to practice individual exercises repeatedly.

・More variety in instructor body types.

・More people around me if the Quest computation power permits. This helps to understand workout when facing sideways.

・The square hit detection zones should be extended to rectangles front-to-back for exercises where only left/right and up/down precision matters. This would make it easier to hit targets even when they're outside your field of view. The hit detection feedback should also be improved which is often times hard for current FOV of Quest.

・Spotify integration maybe? Spotify offers BPM data for every song.

Sorry for having so many suggestions even though I'm not a developer. Keep up the good work!

developer_response.body:
Hi M0ch4, thanks for the 5 star reviews, these things really help us a lot!

Also thanks for the detailed suggestions, keep'em coming!
- Exercise training: noted, although other features have prio at the moment.
- Variety in instructor body types - more instructors are on their way! If you're looking for something specific, don't hesitate to reach out to us on either email or discord with more details!
- More people - would trainer rotation also help here? (the quest computational power does not permit, heh)
- Hit detection - Will be tackled!
- Spotify integration - we're working on an AI trainer implementation for highly personalized, custom workouts and this could perhaps be combined with this, but it will take some time.

Thanks!

reviews.review_description:
The game shows impressive polish with high-quality visuals and an innovative blend of fitness and dancing-ish. I appreciate that it brings something fresh to the VR fitness scene rather than copying existing titles.

However, the game urgently needs a comprehensive tutorial system. As a tech-savvy fitness enthusiast, I found myself completely lost during workouts. The core mechanics - from matching trainer movements to hitting targets at the right time - are left unexplained. 

While the workouts and tournament mode (with its rehearsal and performance phases) are well designed, I struggled without a proper way to learn the movements beforehand. To me, these workouts seem to be fitness choreographies that need practice to master, and the fast transitions and complex combinations become frustrating without any way to practice them step by step.

My suggestion to the developers: First, please add a basic tutorial that explains the game's core mechanics. Second, consider implementing a practice mode where users like me can learn movements at their own pace. This would be valuable for both regular workouts and tournament modes, allowing us to control the speed, perfect our form, and master each movement sequence before attempting full-speed workouts. Adding voice guidance would also greatly improve the experience. 

The foundation is solid, but I believe the game needs these learning tools to help users properly master the movements and reach their full potential.

Currently 4 stars - will update to 5 stars when these learning features are implemented.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review, kind words and enjoying the app, much appreciated!

Improved tutorials are on their way, for different kind of experience levels.

reviews.review_description:
Thank you for listening to my feedback! It’s wonderful that the voices of users can reach the developers directly and lead to improvements. I’ve already raised my rating from 3 to 4 stars!

The reason I couldn’t give it 5 stars yet is that the number of training options is still limited. I’m sure this will improve in the future!

I also have a suggestion. It would be great if there were training options that could be done while seated. This would allow people who can’t move their legs to enjoy training as well. I’d really appreciate it if you could consider this☺️


----------------------------------

I’m enjoying this app, but one thing bothers me: the trainer feels too close. It’s so close that I can’t see their footwork. Is there any way to make them stand a bit farther away?

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the raise ;) 
For the number of trainings, we currently offer 32 unique workouts (through the tournament), 8 longer workouts, and 3 wellness programs. We added a few new workouts for Christmas, as free DLC, too, so I hope that's enough for the coming week?  

More workouts are on the way as we speak; themed workouts, and some of them featuring all new, action-packed gameplay too. Can't reveal more just yet!

reviews.review_title: More than just a dance game!
reviews.review_description: xFIT also has longer workout sessions from 8-10 minutes that target different muscle groups. I tried the leg sculpture and booty builder. In 20 mins I burnt 166 calories and my booty felt built! Would love to see longer and more challenging workouts and custom songs in the future

developer_response.body:
We've got the VRCoach in the house, dancing with us!

Thanks for the review and rating, much appreciated. We'll be definitely adding more workouts (first ones come in this week!) and for custom songs.. it sounds like you already know our secret projects we're working on :D

reviews.review_title: The amount of content is limited.
reviews.review_description: The content available in the app is excellent, but the quantity is quite limited.

developer_response.body:
Hi,
Thanks for the kind words and the 'excellent quality'!

On quantity, the Tournament alone features 64 workouts, taking many weeks, months to complete - but we noticed many people cannot find these, so in our next update we'll present all of these in the regular workout dashboard, making it much easier to enjoy your these.

Also, there are four major content packs coming in 2-3 weeks from now - featuring new game modes, environments, trainers, and especially a big number of songs and workouts!

reviews.review_description:
I feel omitting several features from the previous games was an unwise move — such as:
- Removal of physics on trainer models
- Removal of option to rotate models
- Removal of A LOT of the clothing and skin options from previous games such as being able to make trainers look like they’ve been sweating, interesting headwear, make-up, etc. 
- Removal of ability to customize trainer at main screen. Now we have to wait until we’re close to starting a workout screen to customize. 
As for trainer models, they are the best I’ve seen on VR. 
- I noticed some hand/wrist deformity during some exercises; for example, when the trainer is doing the shoulder rolls and their hands are to their sides, the wrist/hand look odd and unnatural. 

Although you brought some new trainers and features, you removed a lot of greatness that made your games. Some suggestions:
- Bring those awesome features back 
- Transition from exercise to exercise is so quick. I’m assuming it’s to keep the exercises within the time limit but it can get a little tough for beginners and those of us motivated to use the game to get back into fitness. Awesome exercises otherwise :). 

Your recent fitness games really changed the VR fitness gaming experience with the ability to have your trainer right in front of you, the vast customization options and controls, but a lot was left out with this one. Hopefully we get some good updates soon but so far this is my rating of xFIT.

UPDATE: After playing some more, the trainers are at a good distance, but still would like us to have the ability to move them. I am adding a star because it is very entertaining but the above still count for me.

UPDATE: Updated to 5 stars for the team working on these great fitness games. They’re attentive, helpful, and work together with the users of their apps . Great work!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for understanding every 5-star rating enables us to put more love into the games we create, and thanks for helping us!
xFIT has largely been built all-new form the ground up, allowing for tons of new options such as multiplayer, mixed reality, and real interactive workouts; but options like rotating the models and adding customization items from our other games is definitely something we'll do soon again! If you want to chat more, you can find us on Discord too!

reviews.review_description:
I always appreciate a fitness game that does not require a monthly subscription. This game is a great balance between a workout and dance app. It’s a bit more aerobic than the straight up dance games which I appreciate. My one gripe is there are some yoga moves on the ground that are very awkward while wearing a headset. 

Thank you to the devs for giving me an extra option for my workouts!

developer_response.body:
Hey Minwid,

We love the energy and we definitely love your review! The no-subscription method has been our mission from the start and we will be trying to keep it that way.
Stay tuned, besides this aerobic type of workouts like you're mentioning, we're bringing more in the upcoming updates.

Also keep your eye out for DLCs, we may or may not bring the holiday season in VR.

reviews.review_description: I wanna start by saying it's great for the beginning. I really love this game and want to leave an honest review. It's not perfect so it shouldn't get 5 stars but it's really close. The graphics are great and the game is really good. I can see this will be a long term game I will use for my exercise goals for real. Coaches are dope and stuff too. Things that need to improve will just be: needs more exercises that are hardcore, I want to feel the burn when I'm done. The accuracy of the dance moves to the actual beat could be perfect more and adjustable (I think if I'm a 6'1 man and the targets are designed for a 5'1 girl it feels like they are too close to me or inside my body rather then being in front of me where I can see them) also the breaking blocks is good and the move-your-hands-along-this-line thing is good but the fat Bubble is confusing (do we hit it with both hands, slap it, chop it, or grab it to get it to pop😅 maybe a little tutorial would be good. And the coaches mouth doesn't say the words but I'm sure that will be an epic update later on down the road. There should be at least one guy that is more like... Cool, manly trainer, less feminine (I want a guy trainer but when I use them it feels a little homo with the way they move, so I'll stick with the girls for now 😅) Lastly I know this is a "dance" game but it has stretching and yoga stuff soooo the BEST update will be something like this... Because there is hand tracking this game can have you down on hands and knees doing stretches (which trainer should be facing forward for this not sideways) but if this game puts simple PUSH UPS/PLANK/CRUNCHES or whatever it WILL be the greatest and most addictive game ever made on the planet of Earth!!! I really hope they won't change to memberships plan because we already start paying so much for it...but we will see... Again this is an excellent game and for $30 I'm happy with what it has.... But it really needs more hardcore workouts added in order to keep it going... I'll change to 5 stars when it gets done more of these improvements for sure. I have no doubt this WILL be the greatest game ever... But it has a little more to go in order to beat "Les Mills Body Combat"🥇

developer_response.body:
Hey,
Thanks for your detailed review, and also thanks for the kind words on graphics and game! Love it. By the sound of it, you're much fitter than most of audience, but we'll try to keep up with even longer, harder workouts! Any particular muscle-group you're interested in? In the coming weeks, months, hopefully even years, we'll continously add more content, workouts, customization items and.. fix annoyances like the fat Bubble :) A tutorial for this is on the way.  If you're up for some hardcore workouts rightaway btw, including planks, push-ups and crunches, you may also check out Fitness One XR Evolved, as that sounds exactly what you're looking for. But no doubt this kind of hardcore workouts will also find their way to xFIT! In the meanwhile, please remember that every 5-star rating helps us keep doing what we love; the higher we are placed in the store, the more features we can build for xFIT. Thanks!

reviews.review_description:
(Update) OK, while the bug shouldn't have been there, you all responded and fixed it very quickly. I appreciate the responsiveness. Updated to 3 stars until I can spend more time working out! 

(Original 1 star review) I wasted the game trial trying to get it to load, uninstalled, reinstalled and still no workout. I see the main menu, select Wellness or Workout, then select a trainer (I tried both that are unlocked initially) but then I sit on a black screen with looping music. Restarted, reinstalled, nothing but the abyss to question my decision in buying this game. I'll be refunding if I don't get a response from the dev ASAP.

developer_response.body:
We've just rolled out a new update and we'd like to hear your feedback on the game so far.

If you like the additions and quality, please consider changing your review!

Thank you on behalf of the Verseus Games team!

reviews.review_description:
Listen I bought all of the other games this company has made I know they put out a good product I was so excited to try this out but it wouldn’t load the workout after selecting the trainer once I hit start it’s a black screen but I can still hear the music? i have a quest 2 is it not compatible? I’m just confused I haven’t even been able to try it out officially yet I tried numerous times and it just goes to a black screen

I’m willing to change my review I just need something to work with I really want to enjoy your product



Edited: I turned on the game and everything was working properly I changed my review from 1 star to 5 stars I had confidence that the issue would get fixed that’s why I didn’t even request a refund thank you for the fast response and fast reaction time to fixing the issue this company has cemented their name in the sand for VR fitness apps I’m enjoying this game and keep them coming in the future I love the work you guys do!!!!

developer_response.body:
Hey, always nice to hear from a fan who played all our other games! Sorry to hear your experience; your Quest 2 is definitely compatible, and we're looking into the internet-connection issue you described today!

We'll let you know once it's fixed, hopefully fast. Last but definitly not least; I'm glad you mentioned you're willing to change the review, because we need all the help we can get! Having good reviews is key to success.

Update 25.11
We greatly appreciate your review change. We have been working hard on this issue and we're happy this was fixed for you.

We will also be releasing a hotfix version very soon to make sure it solves this issue for everybody and we will also have better tracking options.

reviews.review_description: It worked weeks ago and I really enjoyed it but now it will not load at all. Please fix the game.

developer_response.body:
Hi MelodicBliss,

Sorry to hear the game stopped working on your headset.

Our engineers checked your account to see what went wrong - but can see no attempt to connect our servers. It looks like you're trying to play offline, or something went wrong with the connection. Could you please try to re-install the game and let us know if that worked?

Happy to help you further through our discord channel or email (using the Contact webform on our website) as we can help you faster through these channels. (but if you prefer this method, that's also fine!)

reviews.review_description:
This app provides pretty much what a fitness and dance enthusiast wants.
You get workouts, dances, interactivity, realistic looking trainers and if you are a fan of Daisy, you can train with her 🥰🥰

developer_response.body:
Hi Pacodelu,

This is the kind of feedback we love to hear - Thanks!

reviews.review_description:
Exactly what i was looking for; better than the gym
 and more fun for sure!! Highly recommended!

developer_response.body:
Hi Brenn,

We're sooo happy to see you here! Excited to hear that you're having fun while working out! Keep it up!

reviews.review_description: Love the exercise’s , please keep adding longer workouts !!!!!!

developer_response.body: And we love your energy !!!! Yes, we'll be adding more and more workouts in the future updates. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: Great app, especially when you can use MR in my room ,stops me bumping into the wall. Also guides to help you,defoe recommend Cheers John

developer_response.body:
Hi John,

Nice to see your here! And yes, MR also got us safe from tables, sofas, chairs and more. We're really happy you're enjoying our app. Spread the word and let's keep training!

reviews.review_description: I have tried the workouts and the tournament modes, they are very enjoyable, different intensities, but multiplayer is where the fun and sweat are! 🔥

developer_response.body: Awesome review! Love to see this!

reviews.review_description: Just downloaded this update. Love the Xmas environment.

developer_response.body: Thanks! This is the kind of review that motivates us to make even more, new, fresh content!

reviews.review_description: Repetitive moves. Also you can’t really see / matchup the moves with the circles etc that you have to hit very well

developer_response.body:
Hi Lisa, 
Sorry to hear you didn't like the trial of xFIT - World of Dance. 
We thought that with over 300 unique moves to master, we had significantly more variety than competitors in the space. Feel free to join our Discord if you have concrete feedback you would like to share. Perhaps of your interest; in  the next update, the circles to hit will be more forgiving.

reviews.review_description: I bought this game after a trial as a bundle. It worked for a few days and just disappeared from my library list. Please fix it or return the money

developer_response.body:
Hi Anna,
The issue should be resolved - please confirm it works again for you, and hopefully you can play and enjoy xFIT (and all our other games!) now !
